blended.narrative: Fernie Alpine Resort is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 38 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
